title: Facility map
subtitle: Tap a pin to see queue length, estimated arrival time, and actions.
mobileOnlyHint: Live location + queue informations are available on iOS and Android.
mobileOnlyTitle: This screen is interactive on Android and iOS.
mobileOnlyBody: Open the app on a mobile device to view facility pins, current queue lengths, and navigation prompts.
step1: Run Expo and open the project in Expo Go.
step2: Scan the QR code shown in your terminal.
step3: Come back here - your map will be live on mobile.
tip: Tip: Map interactions are mobile-only; keep this screen open for layout preview.
